front.title: Certificate Management over CMS (CMC)
front.workgroup: Limited Additional Mechanisms for PKIX and SMIME

abstract.t: This document defines the base syntax for CMC, a Certificate Management protocol using the Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS). This protocol addresses two immediate needs within the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) community:
CMC also requires the use of the transport document (RFC 10003) and the requirements usage document (RFC 10004) along with this document for a full definition.
